category_title: Male adolescents at risk of dropping out in vocational training programs
scenario_title: Theoretical science lesson lacking practical application
minimal_context: The student is reading a theoretical science text about electrical resistance and writing down definitions in a general classroom setting.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please read the chapter on the theoretical principles of electrical resistance and write down the definitions.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Is there a practical component to this? It looks like it just involves theory.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just focus on reading the text and writing the definitions for now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: But this has absolutely no connection to our lives or what we actually do.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying to get through the reading activity.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Closes the book) I get bored when it's like this. I've lost interest in the activity and I'm just disaffected with the lesson.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please read the chapter on the theoretical principles of electrical resistance and write down the definitions.

STUDENT: Is there a practical component to this? It looks like it just involves theory.

TUTOR: Just focus on reading the text and writing the definitions for now.

STUDENT: But this has absolutely no connection to our lives or what we actually do.

TUTOR: Keep trying to get through the reading activity.

STUDENT: (Closes the book) I get bored when it's like this. I've lost interest in the activity and I'm just disaffected with the lesson.

task.content: General classroom setting during theoretical science lessons without practical components or real-life connections.

context.materials: Theoretical science lessons, weekend task to collect energy consumption data and cost information, scenarios to contextualize the module
context.social_setting: 12th grade class of ten male students enrolled in a program to be an electrician

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: An approach that involves theory, without a practical component or any connection to their lives
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: They get bored … They lose interest in the activity. They get disaffected with the lesson

behavior_patterns.condition: An approach that involves theory, without a practical component or any connection to their lives
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: They get bored … They lose interest in the activity. They get disaffected with the lesson
